parameters.query: UPDATE campaigns SET status = 'FAILED', completed_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.campaignId }}' RETURNING *

parameters.jsCode:
// Prepare notification payload const errorInfo = $('Extract Error Info').item.json; const notificationData = { title: `🚨 Campaign Workflow Error`, message: `Campaign ${errorInfo.campaignId || 'UNKNOWN'} failed in workflow ${errorInfo.workflowName}`, details: { campaignId: errorInfo.campaignId, workflow: errorInfo.workflowName, executionId: errorInfo.executionId, failedNode: errorInfo.errorNode, error: errorInfo.errorMessage, timestamp: errorInfo.timestamp }, severity: 'error', // Format for Slack-style notification slackText: `🚨 *Campaign Workflow Error*\n\n` + `*Campaign ID:* ${errorInfo.campaignId || 'UNKNOWN'}\n` + `*Workflow:* ${errorInfo.workflowName}\n` + `*Failed Node:* ${errorInfo.errorNode}\n` + `*Error:* ${errorInfo.errorMessage}\n` + `*Execution ID:* ${errorInfo.executionId}\n` + `*Time:* ${errorInfo.timestamp}`, // Format for email notification emailSubject: `Campaign ${errorInfo.campaignId || 'UNKNOWN'} Failed`, emailBody: `

Campaign Workflow Error

Campaign ID: ${errorInfo.campaignId || 'UNKNOWN'}

Workflow: ${errorInfo.workflowName}

Failed Node: ${errorInfo.errorNode}

Error Message: ${errorInfo.errorMessage}

Execution ID: ${errorInfo.executionId}

Timestamp: ${errorInfo.timestamp}

This is an automated notification from n8n Global Error Handler

` }; return [{ json: notificationData }];

meta.description: Global error handler that catches all workflow errors and marks campaigns as FAILED
